title: Payment Service HTTP 504
description: payment-service experiencing HTTP 504 errors. Error rate spiked to 12.4% under elevated traffic; upstream calls from checkout-api and notification-svc began failing shortly after.
resolution: Increased upstream timeout threshold; rolled back payment-service to prior release; verified health on checkout-api and notification-svc.
rca_summary: HTTP 504s caused by configuration drift exposed under a traffic spike — upstream timeouts were too tight and the DB pool exhausted before autoscaling caught up. Mitigated by rolling back and tuning timeouts.
